headline: ON's Gross Margin Expands: Is the 50% Target Finally Within Reach?
summary: ON Semiconductor posts a third straight sequential gross margin gain to 38.5% as AI data center revenues surge and Fab Right lifts utilization and mix.

headline: Semis Race Past Analysts
summary: Average stock in the Russell 1000 trades about 15% below its consensus analyst price target, but the semis have rallied so far so fast that the group has raced past Wall Street expectations.

raw.headline: Semis Race Past Analysts
raw.summary: Average stock in the Russell 1000 trades about 15% below its consensus analyst price target, but the semis have rallied so far so fast that the group has raced past Wall Street expectations.

headline: Tradr Launches Leveraged ETFs on Microchip, NXP, and ON Semi
summary: Tradr ETFs, a provider of ETFs designed for sophisticated investors and professional traders, today launched three new leveraged ETFs on single stocks.  The Cboe-listed funds seek to deliver two times long (200%) the daily performance of a specific underlying stock.  All three ETFs are first-to-market strategies.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on ON Semiconductor, Raises Price Target to $150
summary: Mizuho  analyst Vijay Rakesh   maintains ON Semiconductor (NASDAQ:ON) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $130 to $150.
